title: Days Between Dates Calculator
metaDescription: Calculate the exact number of days, weeks, and approximate months between two dates, instantly in your browser.
shortDescription: Calculate the exact number of days, weeks, and months between two dates.

guideSections.heading: Why 'Approximate Months' Can't Be Made Exact
guideSections.body: Unlike days and weeks, which have fixed lengths, a month varies between 28 and 31 days, so any day-count-to-months conversion is inherently an approximation using an average month length. For exact month-and-day precision between two specific calendar dates, calendar-aware subtraction (as used in the Age Calculator) is more precise than this average-based approach.

guideSections.heading: Why Date Order Doesn't Matter Here
guideSections.body: This tool returns the absolute difference between two dates regardless of which one is entered first, since 'how many days apart' is typically what's useful rather than a signed positive-or-negative value depending on input order.
